conversations.content: How many appointments do I have today?

<function_thought>
To determine how many appointments Emma Johnson has today, I will first retrieve the current day using the `get_current_day` function. This information is essential as it will be used to fetch the appointments for that specific day using the `get_day_calendar_events` function.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_current_day()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
Now that I have retrieved the current day, which is "2024-05-15", I will proceed to fetch the calendar events for this date using the `get_day_calendar_events` function. This will help determine how many appointments Emma has today.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_day_calendar_events(day="2024-05-15")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
